text:
ART 491
Here Saturn-Venus conjunction
Sun Sat.
in Taurus, the house of finance, Mars
Mer. Ven.
will give the native a decentjob. As
next to them Mars is posited in
Moon
Gemini, the Moon in Cancer and
Jupiter in Leo, the-native will live the
life of a royal preceptor under Jupt.
comfortable circumstances. He will
be a great lover of art. He will earn
great name and fame.
CHART 492
Moon Here as Jupiter is alone in Pisces
Jupt. Mer. Sun Ven. his own house, the Moon and Mercury
are in Aries, the Sun in Taurus and
Mars Venus in Gemini all in a line, the
Dh.
native will be a great intellectual.
He will win the favour of government
Dt.
by his intellectual ability and earn
name and fame. He will be a very
competent executive (Mars in
Sat.
exaltation).
Mars contacts first Jupiter and so the native is capable of carrying out
any work assigned to him. He will be stubborn and persistent and this will
help him win the battle some times. He will gain great popularity.

320 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
